summary: Multiple vehicles are stopped in traffic congestion on a multi-laned road. Cars and motorcycles are queued closely together, indicating heavy traffic. Road signs and barriers are visible along the roadside.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are stopped in traffic congestion on a multi-laned road. Cars and motorcycles are queued closely together, indicating heavy traffic.

uncertainties: The exact cause of the congestion is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is no immediate indication of a collision or hazardous behavior among the vehicles.
